//: Baseline permissions shared across machines via git. For scheduled-task sessions to run without freezing on Bash approval prompts, you ALSO need exact-match patterns in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored) that match the exact command the task generates, including any shell redirections like 2>&1. See the .env.example or the README for rationale — verified 2026-04-17 against RevenueCat's working task setup.
